functions.name: CAP
functions.description: Prices an interest rate cap via the LoanBoss Cap Pricer API.

parameters.name: notional
parameters.description: Loan notional amount the cap is based on (e.g. 25000000 for $25M).

parameters.name: strike
parameters.description: Strike rate (rate ceiling). Enter as percent (e.g. 4.5 for 4.50%) or decimal (0.045).

parameters.name: effective
parameters.description: Effective (start) date in YYYY-MM-DD format, or a cell with a date. Defaults to today if blank. Example: "2026-06-01"

parameters.name: termination
parameters.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD or cell date) OR term in months as integer (e.g. 36 for 3 years, 24 for 2 years). Required.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Rate index the cap hedges against. "TSFR1M" (1-Month Term SOFR, default) or "NYFED" (NY Fed SOFR). Leave blank for Term SOFR.

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Pricing field(s) as comma-separated list. Options: bankAdj (bank fees), capCost (total premium), mtm (mark-to-market ex fees), mtmPercent (MTM % of notional), mid (mid-market price), netBenefit (borrower benefit), pv (PV total payouts). Blank = ALL fields.

parameters.name: headers
parameters.description: Include header labels in output. TRUE (default) adds headers, FALSE omits. Leave blank for TRUE.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Spill direction for multi-field output. "H" (horizontal, default) spills into columns, "V" (vertical) spills into rows. Leave blank for "H".
